There are two tiers of experience (assigned by CMS during evaluation of the facility’s waiver 
submission) that determine whether the facility submits data monthly or weekly: Tier 1 hospitals have 
treated “at home” at least 25 patients meeting inpatient admission criteria through their existing 
program prior to requesting an AHCAH waiver; Tier 2 hospitals have treated “at home” fewer than 25 
patients, or none at all, prior to requesting a waiver. Tier 1 hospitals
